source_jobs.title: Perchwell General Interest Form - Engineering
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Perchwell is the modern real estate listings platform built for agents to search smarter, collaborate better, and close deals faster. We are building the future of residential real estateʼs critical listings infrastructure: a platform where market  research and client collaboration converge. Our modern architecture enables continuous innovation at a pace legacy systems cannot match, with AI-powered features and mobile-first capabilities designed for how agents actually work. As consumer expectations and technology evolve, Perchwell remains focused on our core vision:  empowering real estate professionals with the most intelligent, data-driven, and connected platform in the industry.

Backed by leading venture capital firms including Lux Capital and Founders Fund, along with strategic partnerships with some of the country's top Multiple Listing Services (MLSs), Perchwell represents the first major new platform to enter the listings technology market in decades. This unique combination of institutional investment and deep industry alignment provides both the resources and market validation needed to transform the multi-trillion dollar residential real estate industry.






PERCHWELL GENERAL INTEREST FORM - ENGINEERING




Note: This post is not linked to a specific job. If you do not see any current job postings that are applicable to your skillset, please apply here to indicate your interest in joining our Engineering Team. We can keep in touch about new roles that may be a good fit for you and keep you in mind when we have interesting opportunities.

Some examples of engineering roles we typically post include:
DevOps Engineer
Engineering Manager
Mobile Engineer, Android
Mobile Engineer, iOS
QA Engineer
Software Engineer

Thanks for your interest in Perchwell and we hope to speak with you soon!



#LI-DNI


STRONG BENEFITS PACKAGE

 - Flexible PTO, plus 10 paid company holidays

 - 401K with a company match

 - Medical, dental, and vision plans

 - HSA and FSA options

 - Commuter benefits

 - Parental leave

 - Company-wide onsite or offsite each year

 - Beautiful office in Soho, Manhattan with a stocked kitchen, catered breakfast and lunch once per week, happy hours and meet-ups

 

Note: At this time, we are only considering candidates who are authorized to work in the U.S.

source_jobs.title: Senior Android Engineer II
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Perchwell is the modern real estate listings platform built for agents to search smarter, collaborate better, and close deals faster. We are building the future of residential real estateʼs critical listings infrastructure: a platform where market  research and client collaboration converge. Our modern architecture enables continuous innovation at a pace legacy systems cannot match, with AI-powered features and mobile-first capabilities designed for how agents actually work. As consumer expectations and technology evolve, Perchwell remains focused on our core vision:  empowering real estate professionals with the most intelligent, data-driven, and connected platform in the industry.

Backed by leading venture capital firms including Lux Capital and Founders Fund, along with strategic partnerships with some of the country's top Multiple Listing Services (MLSs), Perchwell represents the first major new platform to enter the listings technology market in decades. This unique combination of institutional investment and deep industry alignment provides both the resources and market validation needed to transform the multi-trillion dollar residential real estate industry.




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

We are looking for an experienced Android engineer to take part in all stages of the product development and deployment lifecycle for our mobile applications. Mobile is a core part of our platform—real estate professionals rely on Perchwell while on the go—and our mobile experience is central to how agents search, collaborate, and close deals. As part of our small team of developers, you'll collaborate across the company to help shape our team, processes, and tech stack as we scale our business and technology.




WHAT YOU’LL WORK ON:

 - Build exceptional Android experiences: Design, build, and scale Perchwell’s Android app serving real estate professionals, delivering fast, stable, and intuitive mobile experiences that empower users to search, collaborate, and close deals from anywhere.

 - Own projects end-to-end: Lead major Android initiatives from technical design through launch, setting direction, driving execution, and ensuring quality every step of the way.

 - Accelerate product sales: Our mobile experience is a competitive differentiator for new clients and a delightful extension of the Perchwell platform.

 - Shape Android architecture: Make key decisions on the structure and setup of our codebase to ensure it is scalable, maintainable, and testable in order to accelerate feature development and customer satisfaction.

 - Collaborate across disciplines: Work closely with backend, product, design, and QA to deliver seamless, high-quality user experiences.




REQUIRED FOR THIS ROLE

 - 7+ years of professional Android development experience, with a strong command of Kotlin and the modern Android ecosystem (Jetpack, Compose, Coroutines, dependency injection, etc).

 - Proven track record owning and delivering complex, high-impact features from architecture to development and release.

 - Deep understanding of mobile reliability and scalability, with a track record of identifying and resolving systemic issues.

 - Experience influencing technical direction - defining standards, driving architectural decisions, and aligning cross-functional teams.

 - Strong customer empathy - the ability to translate complex user needs into technical solutions that address both immediate problems and long-term product health.

 - Excellent written and verbal communication skills and the ability to present technical tradeoffs clearly to stakeholders.

 - Strong collaboration with backend and product partners, translating business needs into technical execution.

 - Love ownership, iteration, and making things better every release.

This role is open to remote, but those located in the NYC area will work out of our New York City HQ in Soho Manhattan at least 3 days/week (including Mondays, which are mandatory in-office days).




PREFER

source_jobs.title: Customer Solutions Associate
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Perchwell is the modern real estate listings platform built for agents to search smarter, collaborate better, and close deals faster. We are building the future of residential real estateʼs critical listings infrastructure: a platform where market  research and client collaboration converge. Our modern architecture enables continuous innovation at a pace legacy systems cannot match, with AI-powered features and mobile-first capabilities designed for how agents actually work. As consumer expectations and technology evolve, Perchwell remains focused on our core vision:  empowering real estate professionals with the most intelligent, data-driven, and connected platform in the industry.

Backed by leading venture capital firms including Lux Capital and Founders Fund, along with strategic partnerships with some of the country's top Multiple Listing Services (MLSs), Perchwell represents the first major new platform to enter the listings technology market in decades. This unique combination of institutional investment and deep industry alignment provides both the resources and market validation needed to transform the multi-trillion dollar residential real estate industry.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

We’re looking for a Customer Solutions Associate who thrives at the intersection of customer experience, technical problem-solving, and operational improvement.

In this role, you’ll be the frontline of the customer experience, owning support requests from intake through resolution, while also identifying root causes, improving internal systems, and contributing to a more scalable support function.

You’ll help shape how we support customers by improving documentation, training AI tools, and surfacing insights that influence product decisions. Over time, this role offers a path to take on more strategic customer-facing responsibilities, including deeper ownership of customer relationships and outcomes



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES


CUSTOMER PROBLEM SOLVING & OWNERSHIP

 - Act as the frontline owner of customer issues, taking full responsibility from initial inquiry through resolution

 - Solve customers’ most pressing problems by identifying root causes, not just addressing surface-level symptoms

 - Partner directly with customers to understand their workflows, goals, and blockers, and guide them to effective solutions

 - Deliver a high-quality, empathetic experience while maintaining strong response and resolution times


TECHNICAL INVESTIGATION & RESOLUTION

 - Investigate and diagnose complex product issues across data, workflows, and system configurations

 - Break down ambiguous problems into clear, actionable paths toward resolution

 - Collaborate with Product and Engineering to escalate and resolve bugs, and advocate for long-term fixes

 - Develop deep expertise in Perchwell’s data models, workflows, and integrations


AI & SUPPORT SYSTEMS IMPROVEMENT

 - Train, test, and improve Perchwell’s AI support tools to ensure accurate and scalable customer support

 - Identify gaps in automated responses and continuously improve knowledge sources and training data

 - Create and maintain help center articles, internal and external troubleshooting guides, and increase adoption

 - Contribute to building a best-in-class support system that reduces friction and increases self-service success


CUSTOMER INSIGHTS & PRODUCT FEEDBACK

 - Identify patterns across customer issues to surface systemic problems and opportunities for improvement

 - Translate customer feedback into clear, actionable insights for Product and Engineering

 - Proactively flag high-impact issues and contribute to prioritization of fixes and enhancements

 - Support reporting and analysis that tracks trends in customer experience and product performance


OPERATIONAL EXCELLENCE & SCALE

 - Improve support workflows, processes, and tooling to increase efficiency and scalability

 - Create and maintain clear documentation that enables faster resolution and reduces

source_jobs.title: VP of Finance
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Perchwell is the modern real estate listings platform built for agents to search smarter, collaborate better, and close deals faster. We are building the future of residential real estateʼs critical listings infrastructure: a platform where market  research and client collaboration converge. Our modern architecture enables continuous innovation at a pace legacy systems cannot match, with AI-powered features and mobile-first capabilities designed for how agents actually work. As consumer expectations and technology evolve, Perchwell remains focused on our core vision:  empowering real estate professionals with the most intelligent, data-driven, and connected platform in the industry.

Backed by leading venture capital firms including Lux Capital and Founders Fund, along with strategic partnerships with some of the country's top Multiple Listing Services (MLSs), Perchwell represents the first major new platform to enter the listings technology market in decades. This unique combination of institutional investment and deep industry alignment provides both the resources and market validation needed to transform the multi-trillion dollar residential real estate industry.




WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

You'll play a critical role in driving the next phase of growth for Perchwell. As a member of the executive team, you'll serve as a strategic partner to the CEO, helping shape company strategy, resource allocation, and operational execution as we scale.

This is a high-impact, high-visibility role where you'll build and lead the financial foundation required to support Perchwell's next chapter of growth. You'll operate at both a high-level strategic altitude and down in the details, owning FP&A, fundraising initiatives, board reporting, and cross-functional business partnership across the organization.

We're looking for a highly analytical operator who combines strategic thinking with exceptional execution. You'll help establish the systems, processes, and decision-making frameworks that enable Perchwell to scale while maintaining the agility and ambition that have driven our success to date.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - As a member of the executive team, you will help drive company strategy, growth initiatives, resource allocation, and business performance.

 - Own FP&A, including forecasting, planning, and internal/external reporting.

 - Partner closely with leaders across GTM, Product, and Operations to improve decision-making and drive accountability against company goals.

 - Lead fundraising activities, investor communications, and board reporting processes, serving as a key interface with investors and external stakeholders.

 - Develop and operationalize best-in-class SaaS metrics, reporting frameworks, and performance management systems across the business.

 - Oversee financial operations, budgeting, cash management, and business performance reporting while ensuring financial rigor and discipline across the organization.

 - Evaluate strategic opportunities, partnerships, and emerging business initiatives through rigorous financial analysis and business modeling.

 - Recruit, develop, and lead a high-performing finance organization as the company grows.



REQUIRED FOR THE ROLE

 - 12+ years of relevant experience across strategic finance, investment banking, PE, VC, corporate finance, business operations, or related fields.

 - Experience in scaling high-growth technology or SaaS businesses, preferably in venture-backed environments in the Series B through E stages.

 - Demonstrated success partnering directly with CEOs, founders, and executive leadership teams on strategic and operational initiatives.

 - Experience leading company planning processes, board reporting, fundraising activities, and investor communications.

 - A highly ambitious "roll up your sleeves" mentality and willingness to work cross-functionally to solve complex business problems.

 - Deep understanding of SaaS business models, including recur

source_jobs.title: Senior Engineering Manager
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Perchwell is the modern real estate listings platform built for agents to search smarter, collaborate better, and close deals faster. We are building the future of residential real estateʼs critical listings infrastructure: a platform where market  research and client collaboration converge. Our modern architecture enables continuous innovation at a pace legacy systems cannot match, with AI-powered features and mobile-first capabilities designed for how agents actually work. As consumer expectations and technology evolve, Perchwell remains focused on our core vision:  empowering real estate professionals with the most intelligent, data-driven, and connected platform in the industry.

Backed by leading venture capital firms including Lux Capital and Founders Fund, along with strategic partnerships with some of the country's top Multiple Listing Services (MLSs), Perchwell represents the first major new platform to enter the listings technology market in decades. This unique combination of institutional investment and deep industry alignment provides both the resources and market validation needed to transform the multi-trillion dollar residential real estate industry.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

Perchwell is expanding the engineering leadership behind our next-generation platform. We're looking for a Senior Engineering Manager to lead two teams simultaneously: a core platform team building the foundational infrastructure of the new platform, and a customer-facing feature team building the product layer that agents and brokerages interact with daily.

This is one of the most consequential roles on our engineering team right now - you'll have real ownership over both teams at a pivotal moment, as we build against aggressive timelines and scale the organization around a platform that doesn't yet exist anywhere else in the industry.

This is not a people-management-only role. We need someone who brings genuine technical depth, gets into the weeds when the team hits hard problems, and can hold the line technically while also building a team that scales.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Own engineering leadership across two teams - core platform and customer-facing features - with full accountability for delivery, team health, and technical direction

 - Lead, mentor, and grow engineers through coaching, feedback, and hands-on technical guidance

 - Contribute meaningfully to technical problem solving, particularly around backend systems; this is an actively hands-on role, not a management-from-a-distance one

 - Drive execution against defined deliverables while helping the team work through open architectural questions that don't yet have clean answers

 - Balance planned roadmap work with reactive needs while maintaining clear priorities, expectations, and momentum for the team

 - Strengthen engineering processes including code quality, release readiness, and consistent execution

 - Collaborate closely with product, design, and other cross-functional stakeholders to align on requirements, scope, and sequencing early in the process

 - Hire and onboard additional engineers across both teams

 - Build and sustain a team culture grounded in humility, curiosity, and high standards




REQUIRED FOR THE ROLE

 - 8+ years of software engineering experience with at least 4-5 years managing engineers

 - Strong backend systems experience - authentication, authorization, configuration, and data infrastructure at scale; frontend familiarity is a plus but backend depth is where you'll have the most immediate impact

 - Fluency in one or more of Go, TypeScript, Python, Kotlin, or Ruby; familiarity with React is a bonus

 - Technical depth sufficient to engage credibly with staff-level engineers on hard problems and contribute meaningfully to architectural decisions

 - Demonstrated ability to lead teams through both execution-focused delivery and open-ended technical problem solving

 - Experience managing teams of 5-10 engineers, with comf

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE

Perchwell is the modern real estate listings platform built for agents to search smarter, collaborate better, and close deals faster. We are building the future of residential real estateʼs critical listings infrastructure: a platform where market  research and client collaboration converge. Our modern architecture enables continuous innovation at a pace legacy systems cannot match, with AI-powered features and mobile-first capabilities designed for how agents actually work. As consumer expectations and technology evolve, Perchwell remains focused on our core vision:  empowering real estate professionals with the most intelligent, data-driven, and connected platform in the industry.

Backed by leading venture capital firms including Lux Capital and Founders Fund, along with strategic partnerships with some of the country's top Multiple Listing Services (MLSs), Perchwell represents the first major new platform to enter the listings technology market in decades. This unique combination of institutional investment and deep industry alignment provides both the resources and market validation needed to transform the multi-trillion dollar residential real estate industry.




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

As a Senior Product Designer, you will lead the end-to-end design execution of strategic initiatives at Perchwell, including considerable responsibility over rebuilding core workflows.

This is a senior, high-leverage role responsible for shaping the next generation of our platform across web and mobile. You will operate as the design lead for material segments of Perchwell’s user experience, ensuring quality, consistency, and velocity while partnering closely with Product and Engineering leadership.

You have deep experience designing complex, data-rich platforms and know how to bring clarity to ambiguity. You combine strong visual craft with systems thinking, and you understand how to translate detailed product requirements into intuitive, scalable user experiences.

You will work directly with Product, Engineering, and Design leadership to define interaction patterns, enforce adoption of our evolving design system, and maintain a high bar for usability and polish. We are building infrastructure that real estate professionals rely on every day. Craftsmanship, intent, and customer focus are not optional. They are table stakes.




WHAT YOU’LL WORK ON

 - Lead the full design lifecycle for key Perchwell workflows, from early concepts and user flows through high-fidelity mockups and engineering handoff.

 - Translate complex, data-heavy workflows into intuitive, elegant interfaces that reduce friction and cognitive load.

 - Partner closely with the Product and Engineering Leads to align requirements, scope, and sequencing early in the process.

 - Drive adoption and enforcement of Perchwell’s evolving design system to ensure consistency, scalability, and reduced engineering overhead.

 - Validate design direction through user feedback, usability testing, and rapid iteration before development begins.

 - Contribute to the evolution of Perchwell’s cross-platform design language across web and mobile experiences.

 - Bonus: Experience leading usability and end-user feedback sessions.




REQUIRED FOR THIS ROLE

 - 7+ years of experience designing complex digital products, ideally within B2B SaaS or enterprise-grade platforms.

 - A strong portfolio demonstrating systems-level thinking, data-rich interfaces, and high craft execution.

 - Experience building and maintaining design systems for web and native mobile applications, namely Google’s Material Design and Apple HIG.

 - Experience leading large product initiatives with significant cross-functional coordination and executive visibility.

 - Deep fluency in interaction design, information architecture, and design systems at scale.

 - Ability to operate strategically while remaining hands-on in Figma and execution details.

 - Strong communication skills and the ability to

notes: Perchwell is a real estate listings platform with a strong engineering focus.
